LanguageData.Ancient_WarBeacon_PartsA.label: Broken Beacon Fragments
LanguageData.Ancient_WarBeacon_PartsA.description: Component debris scattered from war beacon wreckage. Internal structures severely compromised - no tactical or comms functionality remains. Still viable as source of metal and composites for resource-starved colonies.
LanguageData.Ancient_WarBeacon_PartsB.label: Broken Beacon Fragments
LanguageData.Ancient_WarBeacon_PartsB.description: Component debris scattered from war beacon wreckage. Internal structures severely compromised - no tactical or comms functionality remains. Still viable as source of metal and composites for resource-starved colonies.
LanguageData.Broken_War_Scorpion_Rust.label: War Scorpion Wreckage
LanguageData.Broken_War_Scorpion_Rust.description: A War Scorpion's remains. You sense valuable components within.
LanguageData.Broken_War_Scorpion_Rust.comps.CompProxi: Approaching the War Scorpion wreckage reveals a faintly glowing red cube embedded in its cranial unit - potentially extractable for your use.
LanguageData.Broken_War_Scorpion_Rust.comps.CompLeavi: Destruction yields a Red Cube - possibly key to unlocking advanced technologies.
LanguageData.Broken_War_Scorpion_Rust.comps.CompInspe: Contains a faintly luminous red cube.
LanguageData.Building_Ancient_WarBeacon.label: Ruined Beacon Site
LanguageData.Building_Ancient_WarBeacon.description: This war beacon bears brutal combat scars - fractured structures whispering of catastrophic battles. Though shattered, its core frame remains resilient, awaiting reactivation. With sufficient resources it could be rebuilt into a functional war beacon, attracting mechanoid attention while unlocking unprecedented technologies. The choice stands: reactivate... or abandon?
LanguageData.Building_Ancient_WarBeacon.comps.CompPro: This war beacon bears brutal combat scars - fractured structures whispering of catastrophic battles. Though shattered, its core frame remains resilient, awaiting reactivation. With sufficient resources it could be rebuilt into a functional war beacon, attracting mechanoid attention while unlocking unprecedented technologies. The choice stands: reactivate... or abandon?
LanguageData.Building_TotalWarfareActivator.label: War Beacon
LanguageData.Building_TotalWarfareActivator.descripti: The restored war beacon looms like a slumbering leviathan. As mechanoids' strategic locus, activation exposes your colony - drawing progressively deadlier assaults. Yet high risk brings high reward: beacon core analysis can bypass mechanoid tech barriers, unlocking previously inaccessible technologies. The choice is yours: preserve safety through silence, or ignite war to grasp the unknown?
